author: Kuber Sharma (@kubersharmax)
description: Onion-layer detection schema for filtering negative ICP signals in Agentic GTM pipelines.

onion_layers.name: Legacy ETL Dependency
onion_layers.description: Prospect relies on scheduled batch ETL for core data movement. Indicates deep legacy middleware investment.

onion_layers.name: Middleware Lock-In
onion_layers.description: Prospect is entrenched in heavyweight middleware that resists zero-copy patterns.

onion_layers.name: Manual Data Wrangling
onion_layers.description: Data movement depends on human-in-the-loop manual steps rather than automated activation.

onion_layers.name: Siloed Data Governance
onion_layers.description: Data access is bureaucratically gated, making real-time activation impossible.

onion_layers.name: Legacy CRM/MAP Fragmentation
onion_layers.description: GTM stack uses legacy or fragmented CRM/MAP integrations that resist modern data activation.
